_comment: RENDER-ONLY clone species for the Easy NPC starter stand-in (bytecode-verified recipe 2026-07-04): Easy NPC 6.25.0's COBBLEMON_ENTITY renderer is species-only (no aspects, ever — verified; no upstream version adds it), so the Hisuian LOOK needs its own species id. Hisui-form stats hoisted from cobblemon:growlithe's forms[0]; implemented:false keeps it out of random rolls, /giveallpokemon and the Pokedex GUI; no dex_entries are shipped (second lock); bare-name references ('growlithe') can NEVER hit this id (getByName is hardcoded to the cobblemon namespace). The real starter stays 'growlithe hisuian=true'. Renders via assets/cobblemon_initiative/bedrock/pokemon/resolvers/growlithe_hisui/ pointing at the AllTheMons-shipped model/texture — without AllTheMons the stand-in falls back to the substitute model (cosmetic only).
name: Growlithe
